message.project-linked: {project} is now linked to this workspace.
message.cloud-detached: Cloud project detached from this workspace.

message.confirm-binding-failed: Unable to confirm the Cloud binding.
message.detach-failed: Unable to detach the Cloud project.
message.rotate-key-failed: Unable to regenerate the access key.
message.delete-access-failed: Unable to delete this access scope.
message.create-mcp-failed: Unable to create the MCP connection.
message.update-config-failed: Unable to update the connection configuration.
message.cli-unavailable: CLI configuration is not available yet.

message.organization-partial: Some organization details could not be loaded.

message.access-partial: Some Cloud access details could not be loaded.
message.history-load-more-failed: Unable to load more Cloud history.
message.history-degraded-count: Cloud history loaded with {count, plural, one {# unreadable commit} other {# unreadable commits}}.
message.history-degraded: Cloud history loaded with incomplete commit data.
message.auth-signout-failed: Unable to sign out of Cloud.
message.binding-sign-in-identify: Sign in to identify this legacy Cloud remote.
message.binding-confirm-legacy: Confirm this Cloud project before converting the legacy Git remote into a workspace binding.
message.binding-confirm-workspace: Confirm this Cloud project to create a durable binding for this local workspace.
message.binding-wrong-host: Switch to the Cloud host used by this binding ({origin}).
message.binding-checkout-mismatch: This binding belongs to another local checkout. Attach this checkout explicitly.
message.binding-response-mismatch: Cloud returned a binding that does not match this local workspace.
message.binding-switch-account: Switch to the account that attached this folder.
message.binding-forbidden: This folder is linked to a Cloud project that the current account cannot access.
message.binding-not-authorized: You don’t have access to the Cloud project linked to this folder.
message.binding-unresolvable: This legacy Cloud remote needs an explicit project binding.
message.binding-network-failed: Unable to verify the Cloud project binding.
message.binding-unknown-remote: A PuppyOne Cloud remote was found, but its project could not be identified.
message.binding-config-error: Unable to read this workspace’s Cloud binding.
message.backup-create-failed: Unable to create a PuppyOne Cloud backup.
message.project-open-failed: Unable to open the Cloud project.

claude.pushFirstCommitDetail: The root Git remote exists, but Cloud has not accepted the first root Git push on {branch}. Product edits, rejected pushes, and commits on non-root scopes do not unlock Claude.
claude.readyDetail: Cloud has an active canonical root Git surface and an accepted root commit. The agent runtime can now be opened for this Project.
claude.rootCheckoutRequired: Open the project root checkout to configure Claude.
claude.scopedCheckoutDetail: This workspace syncs only {path}. Scoped Git access never represents the full Project and cannot unlock Claude. Open or attach the canonical root repository first.
